rationale: Educ. Code §21.703 governs competitive grant awards to school districts with amounts set by commissioner rule. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax values, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not create a direct conflict.
quote: Sec. 21.703. AMOUNT OF GRANT AWARD. (a) Each state fiscal year, the agency shall provide each school district approved on a competitive basis under this subchapter with a grant in an amount determined by the agency in accordance with commissioner rule.
_note: No direct statutory link between the competitive grant program in §21.703 and the residence homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b).
